mapper.select: SELECT SUM(COALESCE(EBS_NETSERVERFEE, 0) + COALESCE(EBS_EXCHANGEFEE, 0)) as total_fee FROM epcc_batch_stat WHERE EBS_TRANSTT IN ('00', '03') AND EBS_BTID BETWEEN #{startBtId} AND #{endBtId} GROUP BY EBS_TRANDATE, EBS_INSTSSRID ORDER BY EBS_TRANDATE, EBS_INSTSSRID

SELECT EBS_TRANDATE as transDate, EBS_INSTSSRID as instSsrId, SUM(COALESCE(EBS_NETSERVERFEE, 0) + COALESCE(EBS_EXCHANGEFEE, 0)) as totalFee FROM epcc_batch_stat WHERE EBS_TRANSTT IN ('00', '03') AND EBS_BTID BETWEEN #{startBtId} AND #{endBtId} GROUP BY EBS_TRANDATE, EBS_INSTSSRID ORDER BY EBS_TRANDATE, EBS_INSTSSRID
